config.script:
class cfieldinfo private m_strFieldName
private m_nOldNr private m_nNewNr
private m_nOldRelType private m_nNewRelType
private m_strOldSQLType private m_strNewSQLType
private m_nOldSQLTypeCode private m_nNewSQLTypeCode
private m_bOldPersit private m_bNewPersit
private sub class_initialize() m_nOldNr = -1 'nie było m_nNewNr = -1 'nie ma być
m_strOldSQLType = "" m_strNewSQLType = "" end sub
public property let name(byval strFieldName) m_strFieldName = strFieldName end property
public property get name name = m_strFieldName end property
public function is_old is_old = (m_nOldNr <> -1) end function
public function is_new is_new = (m_nNewNr <> -1) end function
public function is_persist is_persist = m_bNewPersit end function
public sub setnewinfo(byref arrInfo) m_nNewNr = clng(arrInfo(2)) m_nNewRelType = clng(arrInfo(4)) m_strNewSQLType = arrInfo(5) m_bNewPersit = (arrInfo(6) = "1") m_nNewSQLTypeCode = clng(arrInfo(7)) end sub
public sub setoldinfo(byref arrInfo) m_nOldNr = clng(arrInfo(2)) m_nOldRelType = clng(arrInfo(4)) m_strOldSQLType = arrInfo(5) m_bOldPersit = (arrInfo(6) = "1") m_nOldSQLTypeCode = clng(arrInfo(7)) end sub
public function is_changed() is_changed = (m_nOldRelType <> m_nNewRelType) or (m_strOldSQLType <> m_strNewSQLType) or (m_bOldPersit <> m_bNewPersit) end function public function desc_changes dim str : str = "field " + name + " changes:" + vbCrLf if m_nOldRelType <> m_nNewRelType then str = str + vbTab + ">relation from " + cstr(m_nOldRelType) + " to " + cstr(m_nNewRelType) + vbCrLf end if if m_strOldSQLType <> m_strNewSQLType then str = str + vbTab + ">SQL type from " + m_strOldSQLType + " to " + m_strNewSQLType + vbCrLf end if if m_nOldSQLTypeCode <> m_nOldSQLTypeCode then str = str + vbTab + ">type code from " + cstr(m_nOldSQLTypeCode) + " to " + cstr(m_nOldSQLTypeCode) + vbCrLf end if desc_changes = str + "-------" + vbCrLf end function
public function estimate_default select case m_nNewSQLTypeCode case SQLlong estimate_default = "0" case SQLdate estimate_default = doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(doc_.afc.globals.nulldate()) case SQLtime estimate_default = cstr(doc_.afc.globals.nulltime()) case SQLcurrency, SQLqty estimate_default = "0.0" case else if m_nNewSQLTypeCode >= SQLc1 and m_nNewSQLTypeCode < SQLvc7900 then estimate_default = "''" else estimate_default = "DEFAULT" end if end select end function
public function update_collections(byref rnOldNr,byref rnNewNr) : update_collections = false if is_old() and is_new() and m_nOldNr <> m_nNewNr and m_nNewRelType = RELT_LIST then rnOldNr = m_nOldNr rnNewNr = m_nNewNr update_collections = true end if end function
end class
class ctableinfo private m_pFieldDict private m_strTableName private m_nTypeId private m_bOld private m_bNew
private sub class_initialize() set m_pFieldDict = CreateObject("Scripting.dictionary") m_bOld = false m_bNew = false m_nTypeId = -1 end sub public property let name(byval strTableName) m_strTableName = strTableName end property public property let typeid(byval nTypeId) m_nTypeId = nTypeId end property
public property get name name = m_strTableName end property
public sub mark_old m_bOld = true end sub
public sub mark_new m_bNew = true end sub
public function is_old is_old = m_bOld end function
public function is_new is_new = m_bNew end function
public function get_field_by_name(byval strFieldName) if m_pFieldDict.Exists(strFieldName) then set get_field_by_name = m_pFieldDict.Item(strFieldName) else set get_field_by_name = nothing end if end function public function add_field(byval strFieldName) dim pFieldInfo : set pFieldInfo = new cfieldinfo pFieldInfo.name = strFieldName m_pFieldDict.Add strFieldName,pFieldInfo
set add_field = pFieldInfo end function
public function is_changed() : is_changed = false dim arrFields : arrFields = m_pFieldDict.Items dim iter for iter = 0 to m_pFieldDict.Count - 1 if arrFields(iter).is_changed() then is_changed = true exit for end if next end function public sub alter_table_rename(byref soLog,byref soSQL) soSQL.write "-- alter table " + name + vbCrLf soSQL.write "sp_rename '" + name + "','upg___" + name + "','OBJECT'" + vbCrLf soSQL.write "go" + vbCrLf end sub
public sub alter_table_insert_drop(byref soLog,byref soSQL) soSQL.write "" + vbCrLf soSQL.write "" + vbCrLf soSQL.write "go " + vbCrLf soSQL.write "create procedure upd_"+ name +" as " + vbCrLf soSQL.write "-- HINT - tutaj mozna wstawic procedury" + vbCrLf soSQL.write "-----insert ---------------------" + vbCrLf soSQL.write "insert into " + name + "(" + vbCrLf + vbTab + "IdObj,VersionId" dim arrFields : arrFields = m_pFieldDict.Items dim iter for iter = 1 to m_pFieldDict.Count - 1 if arrFields(iter).is_persist() then soSQL.write "," + arrFields(iter).name end if if iter mod 8 = 0 then soSQL.write vbCrLf + vbTab end if next soSQL.write ")" + vbCrLf + "select"+vbCrLf + vbTab + "IdObj,VersionId" for iter = 1 to m_pFieldDict.Count - 1 if arrFields(iter).is_changed() and arrFields(iter).is_old() and arrFields(iter).is_new() then soLog.write arrFields(iter).desc_changes end if next dim strTODO_info : strTODO_info = "" for iter = 1 to m_pFieldDict.Count - 1 if arrFields(iter).is_persist() then if arrFields(iter).is_old() then soSQL.write "," + arrFields(iter).name else if arrFields(iter).is_new() then soSQL.write "," + arrFields(iter).estimate_default() soLog.write "Warning! Replace DEFAULT with proper value for " + name + ":" + arrFields(iter).name + vbCrLf strTODO_info = strTODO_info + "--TODO:check DEFAULT " + name + ":" + arrFields(iter).name + vbCrLf else soLog.write "Warning! Data from " + name + ":" + arrFields(iter).name + " will be lost" + vbCrLf end if end if end if if iter mod 8 = 0 then soSQL.write vbCrLf + vbTab end if next soSQL.write vbCrLf + "from upg___" + name + vbCrLf + vbCrLf soSQL.write "go" + vbCrLf
soSQL.write strTODO_info soSQL.write "exec upd_"+ name + vbCrLf soSQL.write "go" + vbCrLf soSQL.write "drop procedure upd_"+ name + vbCrLf soSQL.write "go" + vbCrLf soSQL.write "drop table upg___" + name + vbCrLf + vbCrLf + vbCrLf soSQL.write "go" + vbCrLf soSQL.write "raiserror('transfered " + name + "',0,1)" + vbCrLf soSQL.write "go" + vbCrLf
end sub public sub create_table(byref soLog,byref soSQL) dim strOneTable pModule70103.generuj_create_one_table doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(m_nTypeId),strOneTable soSQL.write strOneTable soLog.write "created table " + name + " with current definition"+ vbCrLf end sub
public sub drop_table(byref soLog,byref soSQL) soSQL.write "-- drop table " + name + vbCrLf soSQL.write "if exists (select * from sysobjects where name='" + name + "')" + vbCrLf soSQL.write vbTab + "drop table " + name + vbCrLf soSQL.write "---------------------------------" + vbCrLf end sub public sub update_collections(byref soLog,byref soSQL) dim arrFields : arrFields = m_pFieldDict.Items dim iter for iter = 1 to m_pFieldDict.Count - 1 dim nOldNr,nNewNr if arrFields(iter).update_collections(nOldNr,nNewNr) then soLog.write "update collections for " + name + ":" + arrFields(iter).name +_ " from " + cstr(m_nTypeId*1000+nOldNr) + " to " + cstr(m_nTypeId*1000+nNewNr) + vbCrLf soSQL.write "update collections set idCollection=" + cstr(m_nTypeId*1000+nNewNr) +_ " where idCollection=" + cstr(m_nTypeId*1000+nOldNr) + vbCrLf end if next end sub end class
function read_line(byref pTS) if pTS.AtEndOfStream then read_line = 0 else read_line = split(pTS.ReadLine(),vbTab) end if end function
dim pModule70103 : set pModule70103 = doc_.getmodule(70103)
sub list_table_modif(byref soLog,byref soSQL,byref pInfo) soSQL.write " use %DBNAME% " + vbCrLf soSQL.write " go " + vbCrLf soSQL.write "--========= BEGIN INJECT A ==============" + vbCrLf dim arrTables : arrTables = pInfo.Items dim iter soLog.write "=========Listing new tables =========== " + vbCrLf for iter = 0 to pInfo.Count - 1 if arrTables(iter).is_new() and not arrTables(iter).is_old() then soLog.write "CREATE table " + arrTables(iter).name + vbCrLf end if next soLog.write "=========Listing dropped tables =========== " + vbCrLf for iter = 0 to pInfo.Count - 1 if not arrTables(iter).is_new() and arrTables(iter).is_old() then soLog.write "DROP table " + arrTables(iter).name + vbCrLf arrTables(iter).drop_table soLog,soSQL end if next soLog.write "=========Listing changed tables =========== " + vbCrLf for iter = 0 to pInfo.Count - 1 if arrTables(iter).is_new() and arrTables(iter).is_old() and arrTables(iter).is_changed() then soLog.write "ALTER table " + arrTables(iter).name + vbCrLf arrTables(iter).alter_table_rename soLog,soSQL end if next soSQL.write "--========= END INJECT A ==============" + vbCrLf soSQL.write "--========= BEGIN INJECT B ==============" + vbCrLf 'create new tables in new form 'nie tworzymy tabel juz istniejacych niezmienionych for iter = 0 to pInfo.Count - 1 if (arrTables(iter).is_new() and not arrTables(iter).is_old()) or arrTables(iter).is_changed() then arrTables(iter).create_table soLog,soSQL end if next 'transer data (insert into table select from upg___table) for iter = 0 to pInfo.Count - 1 if arrTables(iter).is_new() and arrTables(iter).is_old() and arrTables(iter).is_changed() then arrTables(iter).alter_table_insert_drop soLog,soSQL end if next soLog.write "=========Listing intact tables =========== " + vbCrLf for iter = 0 to pInfo.Count - 1 if arrTables(iter).is_new() and arrTables(iter).is_old() and not arrTables(iter).is_changed() then soLog.write "OK table " + arrTables(iter).name + vbCrLf end if next soLog.write "=========Listing errors =========== " + vbCrLf for iter = 0 to pInfo.Count - 1 if not arrTables(iter).is_new() and not arrTables(iter).is_old() then soLog.write "Error!!! table " + arrTables(iter).name + vbCrLf end if next soLog.write "==================================" + vbCrLf soSQL.write "--========= END INJECT B ==============" + vbCrLf end sub
function update_collections(byref soLog,byref soSQL,byref pInfo) soSQL.write "--========= BEGIN INJECT C ==============" + vbCrLf dim arrTables : arrTables = pInfo.Items dim iter soLog.write "=========Updating collections =========== " + vbCrLf soSQL.write "--TODO: CHECK ORDER OF UPDATES (when more than 1 collection in object) !! update collections set idCollection=n+1 where idCollection=n" + vbCrLf
for iter = 0 to pInfo.Count - 1 arrTables(iter).update_collections soLog,soSQL next soSQL.write "--========= END INJECT C ==============" + vbCrLf end function
function generuj dim pInfo: set pInfo = CreateObject("Scripting.dictionary") dim fso: Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject") dim pOldDesc : set pOldDesc = fso.OpenTextFile(page_.ctrl(1).value,1) dim pNewDesc : set pNewDesc = fso.OpenTextFile(page_.ctrl(2).value,1) dim arrLine dim pTableInfo dim pFieldInfo dim soLog: set soLog = doc_.createstreamobj() dim soSQL: set soSQL = doc_.createstreamobj()
soSQL.write "-- upgrade from " + page_.ctrl(1).value + " to " + page_.ctrl(2).value + vbCrLf soSQL.write "-- generated: " + CStr(Now()) + vbCrLf
'--- load old definition soLog.write "=========Loading old [" + page_.ctrl(1).value + "]" + vbCrLf do arrLine = read_line(pOldDesc) if not isArray(arrLine) then exit do else if pInfo.Exists(arrLine(1)) then set pTableInfo = pInfo.Item(arrLine(1)) else set pTableInfo = new ctableinfo pTableInfo.name = arrLine(1) pTableInfo.typeid = clng(arrLine(0)) pInfo.Add arrLine(1),pTableInfo end if pTableInfo.mark_old set pFieldInfo = pTableInfo.add_field(arrLine(3)) pFieldInfo.setoldinfo arrLine end if loop while true soLog.write "=========Loaded old [" + page_.ctrl(1).value + "]" + vbCrLf soLog.write "=========Loading new [" + page_.ctrl(2).value + "]" + vbCrLf '--- load new definition do arrLine = read_line(pNewDesc) if not isArray(arrLine) then exit do else if pInfo.Exists(arrLine(1)) then set pTableInfo = pInfo.Item(arrLine(1)) else set pTableInfo = new ctableinfo pInfo.Add arrLine(1),pTableInfo pTableInfo.name = arrLine(1) pTableInfo.typeid = clng(arrLine(0)) soLog.write ">> new table " + arrLine(1)+ vbCrLf end if pTableInfo.mark_new set pFieldInfo = pTableInfo.get_field_by_name(arrLine(3)) if pFieldInfo is nothing then set pFieldInfo = pTableInfo.add_field(arrLine(3)) soLog.write "> new field " + arrLine(1) + ":"+ arrLine(3)+ vbCrLf end if pFieldInfo.setnewinfo arrLine end if loop while true soLog.write "=========Loaded new [" + page_.ctrl(2).value + "]" + vbCrLf
list_table_modif soLog,soSQL,pInfo update_collections soLog,soSQL,pInfo
trans_.message 0,0, "done!"
soLog.save page_.ctrl(4).value soSQL.save page_.ctrl(3).value end function
function fopen page_.ctrl(1).value="c:\navo_eb\sprzedaz\db14.desc" page_.ctrl(2).value="c:\navo_eb\sprzedaz\db15.desc" page_.ctrl(3).value="c:\navo_eb\sprzedaz\upg14_15.sql" page_.ctrl(4).value="c:\navo_eb\sprzedaz\upg14_15.txt" fopen = true end function
